ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institute */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institute */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the institute was established */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institute offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 4 years) */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Bachelor of Technology, Master of Science) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "total_seats" INTEGER /* Total number of seats available for the program */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the admission round (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "quota_name" TEXT /* Name of the quota (e.g., OS, EWS, OBC-NCL, SC, ST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quota */,
  "quota_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of seats allocated for the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., General, EWS, OBC-NCL, SC, ST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_pools" (
  "seat_pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat pool */,
  "seat_pool_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat pool (e.g., Female-Only, Gender-Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat pool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_round_details" (
  "round_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission round detail */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "seat_pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat pool */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats for the specified combination */,
  "opening_rank" INTEGER /* Opening rank for the specified combination */,
  "closing_rank" INTEGER /* Closing rank for the specified combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_round_details_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_round_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_round_details_seat_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_pool_id") REFERENCES seat_pools ("seat_pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_round_details_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_round_details_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "required_for" TEXT /* Description of what the document is required for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, net banking) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who applied */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the student in the admission process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, allocated, rejected) */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment made for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_applications_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation_logs" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation log */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student allocated a seat */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admission round */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quota */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "seat_pool_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seat pool */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the student at the time of allocation */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the seat was allocated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_logs_seat_pool_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_pool_id") REFERENCES seat_pools ("seat_pool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, student, staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., eligibility, selection, additional) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy (e.g., quota policy, seat allocation policy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., admission update, payment reminder) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
